2381500.name: Engine Simulator
2381500.description:
Engine Simulator is an internal combustion engine simulation. The prototype was first shown on YouTube in 2022. Engine Simulator allows you to build completely custom internal combustion engines and listen to your creations using its physically-based audio generator.

Engine Simulator is currently under development.

Advanced, Engineering-Grade Simulation

Engine Simulator uses an advanced fluid simulation based on those used in industry engine simulations. It is not simply some cool visuals, it is a real simulation.

Real-time Audio

Engine Simulator features a comprehensive audio engine, capable of simulating spatial effects, jet noise and of course, exhaust sound. Not only can you design and test your own engines, you can actually hear them in real-time and interact with them like you can with a normal engine.

Engine Designer

Engine Simulator will feature a 3D, graphical editor to lay out components and tubing. Arrange cylinders, exhaust components, collectors, mufflers and other engine parts however you like to achieve the performance and sound you desire. Engine modifications can also be made in real-time, just like you could do with a real engine.

Audio Exporter

Engine Simulator allows you to render high quality audio loops for use in games with traditional engine audio systems.

IMPORTANT: Engine Simulator is an extremely detailed simulation and will require a modern, fast CPU to run correctly.
2381500.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
